name: guardian-helmet-ai
description: Guardian Helmet AI Dashboard - A smart safety system for motorcyclists including real-time crash detection, alcohol interlock check, HUD dashboard, and SOS dispatcher.
author: Swastik Singh

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix backend"
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend
